title: BFUHS Date Sheet 2025 @ bfuhs.ggsmch.org

detail.title: BFUHS Date Sheet 2025 @ bfuhs.ggsmch.org
detail.short_info: The officials of BFUHS have released the BFUHS Date Sheet 2025 for B.Sc. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: BFUHS Date Sheet 2025 is Out! The Baba Farid University of Health Sciences has released the B.Sc. For further updates on BFUHS, candidates can follow this page.

rows: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences

sections.heading: How to Download the BFUHS Date Sheet 2025?

content.text: BFUHS (Baba Farid University of Health Sciences) Date Sheet 2025, use the official university portals for the latest exam schedules across UG, PG, and diploma courses.​

items: Visit the BFUHS official website: bfuhs.ac.in or bfuhs.ggsmch.org.​
On the homepage, look for the “Examination” section or direct “Date Sheets” link.​
Choose your course (MBBS, BDS, B.Sc, M.Sc, Nursing, etc.) and the required semester/year.​
Select and click the relevant date sheet link. Date sheets are uploaded as PDF files view and download to your device.​
Save or print the PDF for future reference.

rows: Date Sheet for Theory Examination of Bridge Programme Certificate Courses in Community Health for the session May/June 2025
Date Sheet for Theory Examinations of various Paramedical Courses for the session May/June 2025
